pillars.title: Kribí Platform
pillars.description: As technical director and lead developer of the educational platform Kribí, I have taken leadership of its entire institutional and digital lifecycle. In this project, primarily focused on preserving the San Basilio de Palenque language, I designed both the system architecture and the digital interfaces that allow users worldwide to interact with this legacy. My work integrates modern AI-assisted design methodologies to ensure the educational system is not only accessible on a global scale but also intuitive and respectful of the cultural identity it represents.

pillars.title: Global EdTech Scalability
pillars.description: In addition to my management of independent projects with high social impact, I have solid experience in the international corporate sector. I currently work as a software engineer within one of the largest and most influential educational technology organizations worldwide. In this role, I am responsible for optimizing large-scale systems, ensuring the stability of platforms used massively by millions of students and teachers, and implementing new intelligent tools applied to digital learning.

pillars.title: Architecture & Processing
pillars.description: My previous experience encompasses solving complex problems in database structure and organization, optimizing computing processes, and delicately migrating records in demanding corporate environments. Furthermore, I have a strong focus on the orchestration of autonomous systems and natural language processing. My main short- and medium-term goal is to consolidate the development of a digital translator for native languages, allowing historical communities to have advanced technological tools for teaching, maintaining, and spreading their own cultural heritage.
